data.title: What's Going On With Marvell Technology (MRVL) Stock?
data.description: Marvell Technology shares are trading higher by some 7% over the trailing week. JPMorgan analyst Harlan Sur highlights Marvell's strong AI-driven growth momentum.

data.title: Jimmy Carter's Funeral: 5 Living Presidents Attend; Family, Colleagues Share Warm, Humorous Stories
data.description: Jimmy Carter's state funeral united five living U.S. presidents, including Trump and Obama. Carter was remembered as a peace-seeking leader.

data.title: Delta Expands Premium Travel Experience with Uber, YouTube, and Joby Partnerships
data.description: Delta unveils AI-powered tool for personalized travel experience, partners with Uber and Joby Aviation, and receives positive outlook from analysts.

data.title: Biden's Final Chip Curbs Set To Shake AI Markets: 10 ETFs With High Stakes In Nvidia, AMD
data.description: Biden admin plans to update export rules targeting advanced semiconductors, restrict access for China and other 'adversaries'. Nvidia and AMD may see impact, major ETFs heavily exposed to them.
